attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE,FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
,EPCH.GEN2_SEQ LEVEL_1_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT, CAST(EPCH.GEN2 AS VARCHAR(30)) LEVEL_1_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,EPCH.GEN3_SEQ LEVEL_2_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT, CAST(EPCH.GEN3 AS VARCHAR(30)) LEVEL_2_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,EPCH.GEN4_SEQ LEVEL_3_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT, CAST(EPCH.GEN4 AS VARCHAR(30)) LEVEL_3_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,NULL LEVEL_4_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) LEVEL_4_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY RPH
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_PROFIT_CENTER_HIERARCHY EPCH
ON (RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE = EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE
)
WHERE EPCH.PL_NODE_VALUE IS NOT NULL
AND (FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE,FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE) 
NOT IN (SELECT COMPANY_CD,DEPARTMENT_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EIS_CA_TOTAL)

SELECT 
    FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
   ,FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
   ,NODE_LEVEL0I_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT
   ,NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
from
(

		SELECT 
		   SUBSTR(COALESCE (NODE_LEVEL20_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL19_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL18_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL17_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL16_VALUE,
		   NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE,
		                     NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE,
		                     NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE,
		                     NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE,
		                     NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE), 1,3) FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
		    ,SUBSTR(COALESCE (NODE_LEVEL20_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL19_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL18_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL17_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL16_VALUE,
		    NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE,
		                      NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE,
		                      NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE,
		                      NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE,
		                      NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE,NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE), 5,6) FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
		   ,LEVEL1.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL0I_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL1.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL1.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
		   ,LEVEL2.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL2.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL2.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
		   ,LEVEL3.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL3.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL3.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
		   ,LEVEL4.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL4.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL4.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
		   ,LEVEL5.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL5.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL5.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
		   ,LEVEL6.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL6.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL6.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
		   ,LEVEL7.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL7.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL7.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
		   ,LEVEL8.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL8.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL8.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
		   ,LEVEL9.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL9.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL9.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
		   ,LEVEL10.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL10.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL10.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
		   ,LEVEL11.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL11.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL11.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
		   ,LEVEL12.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL12.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL12.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
		   ,LEVEL13.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL13.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL13.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
		   ,LEVEL14.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL14.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL14.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
		   ,LEVEL15.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL15.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL15.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
		   ,LEVEL16.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL16_ID_INT
			,LEVEL16.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL16_VALUE
			,LEVEL16.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL16_NAME
			,LEVEL17.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL17_ID_INT
			,LEVEL17.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL17_VALUE
			,LEVEL17.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL17_NAME
		    ,LEVEL18.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL18_ID_INT
			,LEVEL18.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL18_VALUE
			,LEVEL18.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL18_NAME
			 ,LEVEL19.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL19_ID_INT
			,LEVEL19.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL19_VALUE
			,LEVEL19.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL19_NAME
			,LEVEL20.NODE_ID_INT	AS NODE_LEVEL20_ID_INT
			,LEVEL20.NODE_VALUE_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL20_VALUE
			,LEVEL20.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  	AS NODE_LEVEL20_NAME		   		   
		from
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =1 ) level1
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =2 ) level2
		on level1.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level2.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =3 ) level3
		on level2.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level3.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =4 ) level4
		on level3.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level4.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE  Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =5 ) level5
		on level4.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level5.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =6 ) level6
		on level5.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level6.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =7 ) level7
		on level6.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level7.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =8 ) level8
		on level7.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level8.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =9 ) level9
		on level8.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level9.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =10 ) level10
		on level9.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level10.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =11 ) level11
		on level10.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level11.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =12 ) level12
		on level11.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level12.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =13 ) level13
		on level12.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level13.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =14 ) level14
		on level13.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level14.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =15) level15
		on level14.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level15.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =16) level16
		on level15.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level16.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =17) level17
		on level16.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level17.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
				left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =18) level18
		on level17.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level18.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
				left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =19) level19
		on level18.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level19.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
				left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE Where  PL_HIER_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT =20) level20
		on level19.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY = level20.PARENT_PL_HIER_NODE_KEY
		
)RPHIRER
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT  NFDT
    WHERE   NFDT.bk_company_code = RPHIRER.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
  and NFDT.bk_department_code= RPHIRER.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
)
and not exists 
 (select 1 from  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY RPH
         WHERE   RPH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = RPHIRER.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
  and RPH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE= RPHIRER.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
  )

SELECT EPCH.BK_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,EPCH.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT
,EPCH.RU_PARENT_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,EPCH.WITH_PARENT_ROLE
FROM
(SELECT CAST(GEN2 AS VARCHAR(30)) BK_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,GEN2_SEQ DISPLAY_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT
,CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) RU_PARENT_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,'N' WITH_PARENT_ROLE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PROFIT_CENTER_HIERARCHY
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(GEN3 AS VARCHAR(30)) BK_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,GEN3_SEQ DISPLAY_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT
,CAST(GEN2 AS VARCHAR(30))  RU_PARENT_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,'Y' WITH_PARENT_ROLE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PROFIT_CENTER_HIERARCHY
WHERE GEN3 IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(GEN4 AS VARCHAR(30)) BK_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,GEN4_SEQ DISPLAY_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT
,CAST(GEN3 AS VARCHAR(30))  RU_PARENT_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME
,'Y' WITH_PARENT_ROLE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PROFIT_CENTER_HIERARCHY
WHERE GEN4 IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) EPCH
WHERE EPCH.BK_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME 
NOT  IN (SELECT BK_PROFIT_CENTER_NAME FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_BI_PRFT_CNTR_APP_SPCFC)
